title: Bottom tabs navigate between Growth, Feeding, Profile
steps: Load the app fresh (no stored child)
Tap each bottom tab: Growth, Feeding, Profile
expected: Each tab navigates to its route; active tab shows aria-current=page and a non-color-only active indicator
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1 first. Check router route definitions and BottomTabs links. Most likely cause: route path mismatch or missing aria-current. Files: src/app/routes.tsx, src/components/ui/bottom-tabs.tsx. After fix: superpowers:verification-before-completion — run the app and tab through all three; confirm URL + active state.

title: Medical disclaimer is present and non-dismissable on every screen
steps: Open onboarding — confirm disclaimer block is visible
Attempt to dismiss/close the disclaimer footer
expected: Disclaimer (informational only / not medical advice / FTT & IUGR need professional care) appears on every screen and cannot be dismissed; text contrast >= 4.5:1
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check disclaimer is rendered in the shared layout, not per-screen, and has no dismiss handler. Files: src/components/ui/medical-disclaimer.tsx, src/app/App.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion — confirm presence on all 4 screens.

title: FLOW: Add a baby end-to-end and see computed age
steps: Fresh load -> onboarding -> tap 'Add your baby'
Enter name, select sex, pick a valid DOB (e.g. 4 months ago)
expected: Lands on a screen showing the baby's name and correct completed age (e.g. '4 months'); data persists after reload
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) superpowers:systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check the create->persist->read chain and ageFromDob. Most likely cause: repository write/read mismatch or age computed from time-of-day. Files: src/lib/hooks/useChild.ts, src/data/repository/localStorageRepository.ts, src/lib/growth/age.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion — re-run the flow and confirm age + persistence.

title: Future date of birth is blocked
steps: Enter a DOB in the future
expected: Save is blocked; a plain-language error appears BELOW the DOB field
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check Zod schema rejects future dates and the form surfaces the error below the field. Files: src/types/schemas.ts, src/features/profile/ChildForm.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: Sex is required with an explanation
steps: Fill name + DOB but leave sex unselected
expected: Save blocked; explanation that sex is needed (WHO standards differ by sex) is shown
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check schema requires sex and SexSelector exposes a group label + helper. Files: src/features/profile/SexSelector.tsx, src/types/schemas.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: Editing DOB recomputes age
steps: Edit the child and change the DOB
expected: Displayed age updates to match the new DOB
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check update persists and Profile recomputes age on read. Files: src/lib/hooks/useChild.ts, src/features/profile/Profile.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: Profile persists with no login across reload
expected: Child is still present; no login was required
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check localStorage key namespace and that ownerId is stable across reload. Files: src/data/repository/localStorageRepository.ts, src/auth/AuthContext.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: Profile empty state when no child exists
expected: Warm EmptyState 'Add your baby to begin' with an action linking to Add Child
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check the no-child branch renders EmptyState with an action. Files: src/features/profile/Profile.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: FLOW: Log a weight and see percentile, z-score, chart, projection
steps: With a child present, open Growth
Add a weight with today's date
Add a second weight a week later
expected: Each entry appears in history with a computed percentile + z-score; chart shows the 5 WHO curves and the points; projection card shows velocity and a 4-week forecast
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Trace add-weight -> recompute -> render. Most likely cause: lmsForAge lookup/interpolation or chart data mapping. Files: src/lib/who/index.ts, src/features/growth/WeightChart.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion — re-run with two entries and read displayed percentile/z.

title: Percentile and z-score match WHO reference (not snapped to a curve)
steps: Add a weight exactly equal to the WHO 50th-percentile (M) value for the child's sex and age
expected: Displays 50th percentile / z=0 (within rounding); an off-curve weight shows an exact interpolated percentile, not the nearest curve label
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1 — this is the #1 risk. Compare against spike-notes.md reference values. Most likely cause: wrong L/M/S row, sex table mix-up, or CDF error. Files: src/lib/who/*, src/data/who/*. After fix: verification-before-completion — assert against WHO published values.

title: Weight history edit and delete
expected: Edit updates the value + recomputed percentile; delete removes it from history and chart; both persist after reload
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check useWeights update/delete + re-render. Files: src/lib/hooks/useWeights.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: Chart shows 3rd/15th/50th/85th/97th curves plus baby points
expected: Five labelled percentile curves render across 0-24 months for the child's sex; the baby's points overlay correctly; an accessible text/table fallback of latest values exists
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check curveSeries returns 5 series and Recharts maps domains. Files: src/lib/who/curves.ts, src/features/growth/WeightChart.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: Below-3rd-percentile alert: gentle, with gram gap + trend, never red/color-only
steps: Add a weight clearly below the 3rd-percentile value for the age/sex
expected: A caution-amber alert (NOT red) states the current percentile, the GRAMS needed to reach the 3rd-percentile line, and the trend; includes an icon + words (not color alone) and a hopeful next step
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check the threshold (percentile < 3) and percentileWeight gram-gap math; confirm amber tokens + icon. Files: src/features/growth/BelowThirdAlert.tsx, src/lib/who/index.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion — confirm gram gap matches percentileWeight(targetZ)-currentWeight.

title: Projection: velocity, 4-week forecast, gain-to-reach-3rd, transparent + graceful
steps: Add two weights a known interval apart
Then delete one so only a single entry remains
expected: With 2+ points: shows velocity (g/day), a ~4-week projected weight vs curves, and the daily/weekly gain needed to reach the 3rd percentile, with assumptions stated. With 1 point: shows a graceful 'add one more weight' message instead of a projection
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check velocity regression + projection + the <2-points guard. Files: src/lib/growth/velocity.ts, src/lib/growth/projection.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion against a hand-computed example.

title: Weight date outside 0-24 months or before DOB is blocked
steps: Enter a date before the child's DOB (and separately, beyond 24 months)
expected: Save blocked with a calm message explaining the supported 0-24 month range
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check date range validation against DOB. Files: src/types/schemas.ts, src/lib/hooks/useWeights.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: Starter insight cards surface (loss, slow velocity, percentile drop)
steps: Add a sequence of weights that drop across 2+ measurements
expected: A warm insight card flags the percentile drop (and similar cards for weight loss / slow velocity when applicable); language is calm, not alarming; extension point is present in code
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check insights() detection rules. Files: src/lib/growth/insights.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion against a crafted series.

title: Growth empty state with no weights
steps: With a child but no weights, open Growth
expected: Warm EmptyState 'Add your baby's first weight to see the chart' with an Add CTA; no broken chart
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check the no-entries branch. Files: src/features/growth/Growth.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: localStorage write failure shows a calm toast, no data loss mid-session
steps: Simulate a localStorage write failure (quota/private mode)
expected: A calm 'couldn't save' toast appears; the in-memory value is preserved so nothing is lost mid-session; app does not crash
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check repository throws a typed error and UI catches it into a toast. Files: src/data/repository/localStorageRepository.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: FLOW: Enter weight and get daily range + per-feed amount
steps: Open Feeding (weight prefilled from latest entry or entered manually)
expected: Shows a daily ml range = 120-200 ml/kg/day for the entered weight and a per-feed amount = range / feeds
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check dailyVolumeRange + perFeed and the named constants. Files: src/lib/feeding/index.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion against a hand calc (e.g. 5kg -> 600-1000 ml/day).

title: Feeds-per-day stepper updates per-feed amount and clamps at 1
expected: Per-feed amount recomputes; stepper will not go below 1 (gentle block)
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check clamp and recompute. Files: src/features/feeding/FeedsPerDayStepper.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: High-calorie formula yields a LOWER volume for the SAME calories
steps: Enter a density higher than 0.67 kcal/ml (e.g. 1.0 kcal/ml)
expected: Calorie target equals the standard-formula target; the adjusted volume range is LOWER than the standard range; math is shown; kcal/oz and kcal/ml give consistent results
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check calorieAdjustedRange divides the calorie target by the new density; verify oz<->ml conversion. Files: src/lib/feeding/index.ts. After fix: verification-before-completion against a hand calc.

title: Feeding empty state when no weight is available
steps: With no weight entries and an empty weight field, open Feeding
expected: EmptyState 'Enter a weight to see feeding amounts' with a link to add a weight
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check the no-weight branch. Files: src/features/feeding/Feeding.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion.

title: E2E: Onboarding to profile in a real browser
steps: Complete onboarding: add a baby with valid details
expected: The full add-baby journey works in a real browser and persists on reload
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Use /dev-browser to reproduce. Most likely cause: build/routing or hydration. After fix: verification-before-completion in the browser.

title: E2E: Log weights and see chart + alert in a real browser
steps: Verify chart renders and the gentle alert appears
expected: Chart with 5 curves + points renders; below-3rd amber alert shows the gram gap; no console errors
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Use /dev-browser; check Recharts renders in production build. After fix: verification-before-completion in the browser.

title: E2E: Feeding calculator incl. high-calorie mode in a real browser
steps: Toggle high-calorie mode and enter a density
expected: Daily range, per-feed, and the calorie-matched lower volume all display correctly in the browser
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Use /dev-browser to reproduce. After fix: verification-before-completion in the browser.

title: Text contrast >= 4.5:1 on all screens (incl. amber alert + muted text)
steps: Run a contrast checker on Onboarding, Profile, Growth, Feeding
Specifically check the caution-amber alert text and muted/caption text
expected: All normal text >= 4.5:1; large/UI elements >= 3:1
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Adjust the offending token to a darker variant (e.g. --color-text-muted, --color-caution). Files: src/index.css. After fix: verification-before-completion with the contrast tool.

title: All interactive elements are >= 44x44px
steps: Inspect tabs, buttons, stepper +/-, edit/delete row buttons, modal close
expected: Every interactive target is at least 44x44px
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Add min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px]. Files: the offending component. After fix: verification-before-completion by inspection.

title: Keyboard navigation + visible focus rings through all flows
steps: Tab through onboarding, add-child, add-weight modal, feeding controls
expected: Every interactive element is reachable by keyboard with a visible focus ring; modal traps focus and Escape closes it
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Check focus styles and modal focus trap. Files: src/components/ui/modal.tsx. After fix: verification-before-completion by keyboard-only run.

title: Status never by color alone; icon-only buttons have aria-label
steps: Inspect the below-3rd alert, badges, and any icon-only buttons (e.g. modal close, row actions)
expected: Every status has an icon + text (not color alone); every icon-only button has an aria-label
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Add icon+text and aria-labels. Files: the offending component. After fix: verification-before-completion by inspection.

title: Inputs have visible labels; reduced motion respected
steps: Inspect all form inputs for visible <label>
Enable prefers-reduced-motion and observe the blob drift / press animations
expected: No placeholder-only inputs; with reduced motion set, decorative animations are disabled
fix_agent_context: If this fails: 1) systematic-debugging Phase 1. Add labels / gate animations behind the media query. Files: src/components/ui/input.tsx, src/index.css. After fix: verification-before-completion.
